name: Rafiul Hasan
bio: Met at BUET during freshman year. We were roommates for 3 years. Now he works as a civil engineer in Chattogram.
why_contact: Check in on his new infrastructure project and catch up on life in Chattogram.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Grew up in the same para in Mirpur. We've known each other since Class 3. She's now a doctor at Dhaka Medical College Hospital.
why_contact: She mentioned starting a community health camp — want to hear how it went.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: Colleague at a fintech startup in Gulshan. We bond over cricket — rarely miss a Bangladesh match together. Sharp developer and great teammate.
why_contact: Discuss the upcoming Bangladesh vs. India series and his thoughts on the new project stack at work.

name: Sumaiya Akter
bio: Study group partner from Dhaka University. She mentored me through my thesis on Bengali literature. Now a lecturer at Rajshahi University.
why_contact: Ask for her guidance on a research paper I'm drafting. She always gives the sharpest feedback.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: Met at Notre Dame College in Dhaka. We travel together every Eid — last trip was Cox's Bazar. He runs a popular travel photography page on Facebook.
why_contact: Plan our next Eid trip and check out his new photo series from Sundarbans.

name: Farida Begum
bio: Family friend from Sylhet. Our parents have known each other for decades. She moved to Sylhet City after marriage but we stay in regular touch.
why_contact: She promised to share her hilsa recipe — also just want to check in on how she's settling in.

name: Sabbir Rahman
bio: Best friend from school in Khulna. We played football together for 6 years. He's now running his family's shrimp export business in Mongla.
why_contact: It's been too long — catch up on the business and reminisce about our Khulna days.

name: Maliha Sultana
bio: We met at a climate action workshop in Dhaka. Both avid readers — we run a small Bengali book club together online. She works for an NGO focused on flood-affected communities.
why_contact: Pick the next book club title and hear about her latest field work in Sylhet's haor region.

name: Arif Hossain
bio: Lab partner from BUET's EEE department. He co-founded a solar energy startup in Bogura after graduating. One of the most driven people I know.
why_contact: Want to learn about his startup's latest solar pilot project and possibly connect him with an investor I know.

name: Riya Chakraborty
bio: Met at Charukala (Faculty of Fine Arts) in Dhaka. She's an incredible painter whose work has been exhibited in Shilpakala Academy. We grab tea in Aziz Super Market regularly.
why_contact: She has a new exhibition coming up — want to confirm I'm attending and hear about the theme.

name: Mahmudul Karim
bio: Debate team captain from Rajshahi Collegiate School. We competed nationally together in 2014. He's now a barrister practicing in Dhaka's High Court.
why_contact: Congratulate him on winning a landmark case I read about — and just reconnect after too long.
relationship_detail: School debate partner, sharp legal mind

name: Tasnia Farin
bio: Senior engineer at a Dhaka-based SaaS company. She took me under her wing when I joined the industry. Incredibly patient teacher and brilliant systems thinker.
why_contact: Ask for her advice on a system design problem I'm stuck on — she always has the clearest mental models.

name: Rezaul Karim
bio: Met through student politics at Jahangirnagar University. He's passionate about rural development and now works with BRAC in Pabna. Incredibly grounded person.
why_contact: He's been running a microfinance pilot — curious to hear the early results and offer support.

name: Shirin Akhter
bio: Our families have been close since before we were born — we grew up attending the same events in Comilla. She plays sitar beautifully and now teaches classical music.
why_contact: She mentioned recording her first album — want to hear how the sessions are going and show support.

name: Nazmul Islam
bio: Freelance UI/UX designer based in Rangpur. We collaborate on projects regularly — he has an exceptional eye for detail and a deep love for Bengali typography.
why_contact: Review the latest mockups for our joint project and get his take on the new color direction.

name: Jannatul Ferdous
bio: Best friend from Natore Government Girls' School. We've stayed close despite living in different cities for 10 years. She's a pharmacist in Khulna now.
why_contact: She just moved to a new apartment — want to congratulate her and hear about the new neighborhood.

name: Osman Gani
bio: Met backpacking through Cox's Bazar years ago. He now runs a boutique eco-resort in Inani Beach. One of the most entrepreneurial spirits I've ever met.
why_contact: Planning a trip to Cox's Bazar — want to stay at his resort and catch up in person.

name: Bristy Roy
bio: Hackathon teammate from BUET's CS department. We built a flood prediction model that won nationally. She's now doing her PhD in machine learning at BUET.
why_contact: She's presenting her research next week — want to wish her luck and ask if I can attend.

name: Shahadat Hossain
bio: Grew up on the same street in Jessore. We were inseparable from ages 8 to 18. He emigrated to Malaysia for work and we've drifted — but the bond is still there.
why_contact: He's coming back to Bangladesh for Eid — need to plan a reunion before he flies back.

name: Dilruba Yasmin
bio: Fellow writer I met at a Bangla Academy literary festival. She's published two collections of short stories and is working on her first novel. We critique each other's drafts regularly.
why_contact: She sent me her novel's first chapter to review — need to give her detailed feedback this week.
